[DQC.US.0156.10074] The filer has reported a value of 8,625,000 using the extension concept CIK0002093507:BasicAndDilutedWeightedAverageSharesOutstanding. This value should be tagged with separate US GAAP elements for the Basic amount and the diluted amount. This means the same fact needs to be tagged with separate elements. An extension element should not be used to tag this fact.
The properties of this CIK0002093507:BasicAndDilutedWeightedAverageSharesOutstanding fact are:
Period :2025-08-01 to 2025-10-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:StatementClassOfStockAxis=CIK0002093507:RedeemableSharesMember Unit : shares
